summary: An ABC World News Tonight segment on the murder of Loyola University student Sheridan Gorman and the charging of a Venezuelan suspect said to be in the country illegally, shown with a mugshot graphic and reporter voiceover. Standard network-news package; no music or stylized production.
notable_text: ABC World News Tonight 'BREAKING NEWS' / 'STUDENT MURDER SUSPECT IN U.S. ILLEGALLY' / 'LOYOLA UNIVERSITY CHICAGO FRESHMAN SHOT TO DEATH'
